assertions.title: 3 workflow tabs render in 3D perspective stack

steps.action: Connect to Electron app via CDP

steps.observed: Found Decarb @e9, Infusion @e10, Dose @e11 buttons in tab strip
Standard 2D tab interface - no 3D card stack visible. Tabs are in a flat horizontal strip at top.

assertions.issues: No 3D perspective SwipeDeck component found. The app uses a standard flat tab strip navigation with Dashboard, Quick Batch, Decarb, Infusion, Dose, Methods, Fats, Knowledge, Journal, and First-Timer Guide tabs. There is no card stack, no swipe gestures, and no 3D transform animations.

assertions.title: Touch swipe left/right triggers tab transition with 3D flip animation
assertions.issues: VAL-SWIPEDECK-001 failed - no SwipeDeck component exists. This assertion is blocked.

assertions.title: Trackpad horizontal two-finger scroll triggers tab transition
assertions.issues: VAL-SWIPEDECK-001 failed - no SwipeDeck component exists. This assertion is blocked.

assertions.title: Keyboard ArrowLeft/ArrowRight triggers tab transition

steps.expected: Tab transition to next tab with 3D flip
steps.observed: No visible tab transition - still shows Decarb tab content

assertions.issues: Keyboard arrow keys do not trigger tab navigation. The app uses standard click-based tab navigation only.

assertions.title: Mouse edge-hover triggers tab transition with delay
assertions.issues: VAL-SWIPEDECK-001 failed - no SwipeDeck component exists. This assertion is blocked.

assertions.title: prefers-reduced-motion disables 3D animation
assertions.issues: VAL-SWIPEDECK-001 failed - no SwipeDeck component exists. This assertion is blocked.

assertions.title: Active tab content persists and remains interactive after transition

steps.action: Navigate to Knowledge tab via click
steps.observed: Knowledge page displayed with citation links (Wang et al. 2016, Tahir et al. 2021, etc.)

steps.action: Navigate back to Decarb tab via click
steps.expected: Decarb tab restored with all inputs
steps.observed: Decarb tab restored with Flower/Concentrate buttons, preset selector, input fields

assertions.title: Non-workflow tabs appear in separate mini-strip

steps.observed: All tabs (Dashboard, Quick Batch, Decarb, Infusion, Dose, Methods, Fats, Knowledge, Journal, First-Timer Guide) are in a single flat horizontal tab strip at the top

assertions.issues: No separate mini-strip visible. All tabs are in one horizontal strip.

assertions.title: Swipe on mini-strip does NOT affect workflow tabs
assertions.issues: VAL-SWIPEDECK-001 failed - no SwipeDeck component or mini-strip exists. This assertion is blocked.

assertions.title: Rapid successive swipes are debounced
assertions.issues: VAL-SWIPEDECK-001 failed - no SwipeDeck component exists. This assertion is blocked.

assertions.title: First tab (Decarb) has no left-edge hover zone
assertions.issues: VAL-SWIPEDECK-001 failed - no SwipeDeck component or edge-hover zones exist. This assertion is blocked.

assertions.title: Last tab (Dose) has no right-edge hover zone
assertions.issues: VAL-SWIPEDECK-001 failed - no SwipeDeck component or edge-hover zones exist. This assertion is blocked.

assertions.title: Vertical touch swipe does NOT trigger tab transition
assertions.issues: VAL-SWIPEDECK-001 failed - no SwipeDeck component exists. This assertion is blocked.

assertions.title: Active tab indicator updates synchronously with transition

steps.observed: Tab indicator changed to Knowledge tab immediately upon click
Tab indicator changed back to Decarb tab immediately upon click

assertions.title: SwipeDeck 3D perspective preserved across window resize
assertions.issues: VAL-SWIPEDECK-001 failed - no SwipeDeck component exists. This assertion is blocked.

assertions.title: Console remains error-free throughout all SwipeDeck interactions

frictions.description: Knowledge tab click by text timed out, had to use button ref @e9 to navigate back to Decarb
frictions.resolution: Used ref-based click: click @e9 instead of click "Decarb"

blockers.description: VAL-SWIPEDECK-001 failed - the SwipeDeck component with 3D perspective card stack does not exist in the Cannabis Chemistry Calculator app. The app uses a standard flat tab strip navigation without swipe gestures or 3D transforms.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: N/A - this is a feature that doesn't exist in the current application

summary: Tested 16 assertions for SwipeDeck component. 2 passed (VAL-SWIPEDECK-007, VAL-SWIPEDECK-014 - basic tab navigation), 2 failed (VAL-SWIPEDECK-001 - no 3D perspective stack exists, VAL-SWIPEDECK-004 - keyboard arrows don't trigger tabs, VAL-SWIPEDECK-008 - no mini-strip), 11 blocked due to missing SwipeDeck component. The Cannabis Chemistry Calculator uses standard flat tab navigation, not a swipeable 3D card stack.
